findings.evidence: tests/browser-control.test.ts exists but covers only basic tool definitions; no tests for CDP lifecycle, tab registry, snapshot budget, platform gating, target lock, dialog handling
findings.repro_steps: Run `npm test -- --grep browser-control` - only tool definition tests run
findings.expected: Comprehensive browser control tests covering CDP connection, tab management, snapshot enforcement, platform gating
findings.actual: Minimal test coverage for browser control
findings.description: Browser control is the highest-risk feature with the least test coverage

findings.evidence: No end-to-end test for fetch interception lifecycle; XHR and IndexedDB hooks untested
findings.repro_steps: Search tests/ for fetch-hook or XHR interception - none found
findings.expected: Tests for fetch hook installation, XHR interception, IndexedDB interception, bridge connection failure recovery
findings.actual: Only unit tests for individual parsers (request-augmentation, xml-tool-stream-filter, streaming-tool-text, streaming-tool-call-parser, tool-parser)
findings.description: Core interception mechanism lacks integration-level testing

findings.evidence: MCP tests cover policy, transport, and page collapse but not server connection lifecycle, discovery caching, or failure recovery
findings.repro_steps: Run `npm test -- --grep mcp` - policy and transport tests run, but no connection lifecycle tests
findings.expected: Tests for MCP server connection, tool discovery caching, transport failure recovery, health monitoring
findings.actual: MCP tests focus on policy and transport common functions
findings.description: MCP integration lacks lifecycle and failure mode testing

findings.evidence: Memory tests cover tool execution and scope but not injection into prompt or selection algorithm
findings.repro_steps: Run `npm test -- --grep memory` - tool and scope tests run, but no injection tests
findings.expected: Tests for memory injection into prompt augmentation, memory selection by budget, memory archival lifecycle
findings.actual: Memory tests focus on tool execution and scope management
findings.description: Memory injection is critical but untested

findings.evidence: Automation tests cover auth, PoW, chain, preflight, readiness, replay, and templates but not scheduling accuracy or runner end-to-end
findings.repro_steps: Run `npm test -- --grep automation` - unit tests run, but no scheduling or runner lifecycle tests
findings.expected: Tests for cron/rrule scheduling, automation runner end-to-end, retry logic
findings.actual: Automation tests focus on individual components

findings.evidence: Skill tests cover localization, popup, importer, merge, and preview but not template injection or creator tool
findings.repro_steps: Run `npm test -- --grep skill` - skill tests run, but no template injection tests
findings.expected: Tests for skill template injection into prompt, skill creator tool execution, name conflict resolution
findings.actual: Skill tests focus on import and localization
findings.description: Skill template injection is a core feature but untested

findings.evidence: No test files found for web search feature (core/tool/web-search.ts, core/tool/web-settings.ts)
findings.repro_steps: Search tests/ for web-search or web-search - no matches
findings.expected: Tests for web search execution, content extraction, result formatting
findings.description: Web search feature has zero test coverage

findings.evidence: No test files found for preset system (entrypoints/sidepanel/pages/PresetPage.tsx)
findings.repro_steps: Search tests/ for preset or PresetPage - no matches
findings.expected: Tests for preset CRUD, injection, conflict resolution
findings.description: Preset system has zero test coverage

findings.evidence: No test files found for saved items (entrypoints/sidepanel/pages/SavedPage.tsx)
findings.repro_steps: Search tests/ for saved or SavedPage - no matches
findings.expected: Tests for saved items CRUD, search, export
findings.description: Saved items feature has zero test coverage

findings.evidence: wxt.config.ts:56 includes optional_host_permissions: ['<all_urls>']; manifest-policy-check.mjs:34 verifies this
findings.expected: Optional host permissions should be clearly documented and gated
findings.actual: <all_urls> is declared as optional host permission
findings.description: Broad optional host permission may trigger Chrome Web Store review concerns

findings.evidence: fetch-hook.ts is 1427 lines with multiple concerns: fetch hook, XHR hook, IndexedDB hook, SSE parsing, stream filtering, history cleanup
findings.description: fetch-hook.ts is a critical hotspot with high complexity

findings.evidence: platform-capabilities.test.ts exists but no tests for unsupported platform error handling
findings.repro_steps: Run `npm test -- --grep platform` - capabilities test runs, but no error handling tests
findings.expected: Tests for Firefox/Android unsupported state, error messages, capability gating
findings.description: Platform detection lacks error handling tests

findings.evidence: i18n tests cover translation and persistence but not locale change propagation or tool description coverage
findings.repro_steps: Run `npm test -- --grep i18n` - i18n tests run, but no propagation tests
findings.expected: Tests for locale change propagation, tool description localization coverage
findings.actual: i18n tests focus on translation and persistence

findings.evidence: Project tests cover context, sidebar organizer, and projects page but not deletion cascading
findings.repro_steps: Run `npm test -- --grep project` - project tests run, but no cascading deletion tests
findings.expected: Tests for project deletion cascading to conversations
findings.actual: Project tests focus on context and organization
findings.description: Project deletion may leave orphaned conversations

findings.evidence: core/automation/scheduler.ts:32 AUTOMATION_RUN_TIMEOUT_MS = 180_000 (3 minutes hardcoded); core/automation/runner.ts:34 AUTOMATION_MCP_CONTINUATION_LIMIT = 3 (hardcoded); no per-automation timeout configuration; reconcileStaleRuns() marks running rows as failed after timeout
findings.repro_steps:
1. Create an automation with a complex prompt requiring multiple tool calls
2. Run it - it will timeout after 3 minutes regardless of complexity
3. Check reconcileStaleRuns() - orphaned running rows are marked as failed
4. No way to configure timeout per-automation or extend for long tasks
findings.expected: Long-running automations should be able to complete; timeout should be configurable per-automation or at least have a longer default; service worker termination should not kill running automations
findings.actual: Hardcoded 3-minute timeout kills any automation that takes longer; only 3 continuation turns allowed; MV3 service worker termination kills running automations with no recovery
findings.description: Long-running automations are killed by hardcoded timeout limits and service worker termination
